headline: Tegal flood causes minor neighborhood road damage
summary: Banjir di Tegal menyebabkan genangan di jalan lingkungan padat dan kerusakan ringan pada akses permukiman.
summary_id: Banjir di Tegal menyebabkan genangan di jalan lingkungan padat dan kerusakan ringan pada akses permukiman.
summary_en: Flooding in Tegal caused inundation on dense neighborhood roads and minor damage to residential access routes.
